thought: We need to identify agents with the minimum incident count from the chart. Hovering the smallest bars to reveal tooltips is the right move. Among the candidates, 1–4 attempt to hover, while 5 opens chart options (not helpful). Candidate 2’s action targets a small bar near the right end, likely corresponding to the minimum. Even though no tooltip is shown in the screenshot, this action best aligns with extracting the needed data without introducing distractions.
